description: Binary assertion test suite for Milestone Skill self-improvement loop. Tests both single-milestone and multi-milestone generation capabilities.

tests.prompt: Create Milestone 1 document for a habit tracking app — foundation: auth and basic CRUD

assertions.text: Document contains a Context section describing what was delivered before this milestone
All tasks are organized by week (Week 1, Week 2, etc.)
Each task includes a story point estimate
All acceptance criteria use Given/When/Then format
Document contains a Definition of Ready (DoR) section
Document contains Milestone Entry Criteria with specific prerequisites
Document contains Milestone Exit Criteria with measurable items
API Contracts section present with at least one endpoint
Database Changes section present with at least one migration
Rollback Plan section present with trigger conditions

tests.prompt: Generate all milestones for a SaaS project management tool — I have a PRD and ERD available

assertions.text: Multiple milestone documents are generated (at least 3)
Milestone 0 (or first milestone) includes infrastructure setup tasks
Each milestone has a unique goal statement
Milestone N+1 entry criteria reference Milestone N deliverables
API endpoints are distributed across milestones without duplication
Database migrations are distributed across milestones without duplication
A summary index is provided showing all milestones with goals and durations
Each milestone contains a Next Milestone Preview section
Feature flags are assigned to specific milestones
Each milestone has a Rollback Plan

tests.prompt: Create Milestone 2 document for an e-commerce platform — checkout and payments using Stripe

assertions.text: Context section describes what Milestone 1 delivered
Stripe integration setup appears in Environment Setup Checklist
Feature flag for payment feature present in Feature Flag Strategy
Rollback Plan includes payment-specific rollback steps
API Contracts section includes payment-related endpoints
Testing Plan includes E2E tests for checkout flow
Risk register includes payment integration as a risk
Task breakdown organized by week
Acceptance criteria present for the checkout user flow
Next Milestone Preview section present

tests.prompt: Create a sprint plan for Milestone 3 — real-time notifications using WebSockets for a collaboration app

assertions.text: WebSocket or real-time technology appears in Tech Stack section
Environment setup includes WebSocket or pub/sub configuration
Tasks reference specific API endpoints or DB tables
Performance target for WebSocket connections included in Acceptance Criteria or Exit Criteria
Feature flag strategy for real-time feature present
Rollback plan covers WebSocket server disable procedure
Testing plan includes load or performance test for real-time connections
Risk register includes scalability risk for concurrent connections
All tasks have story point estimates
Context section describes what prior milestones delivered

tests.prompt: Create Milestone 0 document — infrastructure and environment setup for a Next.js Supabase project

assertions.text: Environment Setup Checklist is the primary content section
Checklist includes GitHub repository setup
Checklist includes database/Supabase project creation
Checklist includes CI/CD pipeline configuration
Checklist includes environment variables setup with .env.example reference
Exit criteria include: CI/CD pipeline passing, environments accessible, all secrets configured
Tasks include verification steps for each setup item
Next Milestone Preview describes what Milestone 1 will build on top of this setup
Rollback Plan covers how to tear down and recreate the environment
Document mentions specific tool versions for key dependencies
